records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, just give up already! Why are you so persistent?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, just give up already! Why are you so persistent?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, just give up already! Why are you so persistent?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should be the one giving up. You're just wasting both of our time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should be the one giving up. You're just wasting both of our time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should be the one giving up. You're just wasting both of our time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you stupid? I wouldn't run away if I were going to just give up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you stupid? I wouldn't run away if I were going to just give up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you stupid? I wouldn't run away if I were going to just give up!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?! My ears!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?! My ears!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?! My ears!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surround her! She has nowhere to run!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surround her! She has nowhere to run!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surround her! She has nowhere to run!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's unfair! You really want to outnumber one girl?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's unfair! You really want to outnumber one girl?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's unfair! You really want to outnumber one girl?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a Counter, and it's only fair. See? Why did you have to run away in the first place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a Counter, and it's only fair. See? Why did you have to run away in the first place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a Counter, and it's only fair. See? Why did you have to run away in the first place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew. She's quiet now. Stay still, and we won't do anything bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew. She's quiet now. Stay still, and we won't do anything bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew. She's quiet now. Stay still, and we won't do anything bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't want to get hurt, do you? We don't want to struggle against a girl, either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't want to get hurt, do you? We don't want to struggle against a girl, either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't want to get hurt, do you? We don't want to struggle against a girl, either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh? What do you think you're doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh? What do you think you're doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh? What do you think you're doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blegh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blegh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blegh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd keep that smolder to yourself. The only woman you're going to impress is your mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd keep that smolder to yourself. The only woman you're going to impress is your mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd keep that smolder to yourself. The only woman you're going to impress is your mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's embarrassing to see you try so hard when we all know you're going to go flying with the slightest shove.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's embarrassing to see you try so hard when we all know you're going to go flying with the slightest shove.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's embarrassing to see you try so hard when we all know you're going to go flying with the slightest shove.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah. So you really do want to get beat up. Is that what floats your boat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah. So you really do want to get beat up. Is that what floats your boat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah. So you really do want to get beat up. Is that what floats your boat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not. I think you're really going to be sent flying, so be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not. I think you're really going to be sent flying, so be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not. I think you're really going to be sent flying, so be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or hold on to something, at least.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or hold on to something, at least.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or hold on to something, at least.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait, what's that huge duck?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait, what's that huge duck?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait, what's that huge duck?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh. Sorry to keep you waiting, Yuppie! Here's Captain Sigma!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh. Sorry to keep you waiting, Yuppie! Here's Captain Sigma!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh. Sorry to keep you waiting, Yuppie! Here's Captain Sigma!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. Even though it's to find treasure, I didn't expect I'd end up joining forces with little pirates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha. Even though it's to find treasure, I didn't expect I'd end up joining forces with little pirates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. Even though it's to find treasure, I didn't expect I'd end up joining forces with little pirates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you truly never know what the future holds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you truly never know what the future holds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you truly never know what the future holds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yarr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yarr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yarr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief and... Wait, is that the duck from the Town Soldiers of Bremen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief and... Wait, is that the duck from the Town Soldiers of Bremen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief and... Wait, is that the duck from the Town Soldiers of Bremen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, what's going on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, what's going on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, what's going on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough with the underestimating...! First a girl, and now a duck?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough with the underestimating...! First a girl, and now a duck?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough with the underestimating...! First a girl, and now a duck?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think we're some kind of extras!?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think we're some kind of extras!?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think we're some kind of extras!?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The three essential elements a pirate should have! The first is the yearning for treasure! The second is the quickness to overcome any situation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The three essential elements a pirate should have! The first is the yearning for treasure! The second is the quickness to overcome any situation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The three essential elements a pirate should have! The first is the yearning for treasure! The second is the quickness to overcome any situation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The third is the courage to sail out to sea!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The third is the courage to sail out to sea!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The third is the courage to sail out to sea!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once you forget them, you're nothing but lubbers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once you forget them, you're nothing but lubbers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once you forget them, you're nothing but lubbers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lubbers can't beat true pirates! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lubbers can't beat true pirates! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lubbers can't beat true pirates! Yarr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you calling pirates?! We're mercenaries!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you calling pirates?! We're mercenaries!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you calling pirates?! We're mercenaries!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmpf, if you choose to deny it, there's only one way to settle this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmpf, if you choose to deny it, there's only one way to settle this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmpf, if you choose to deny it, there's only one way to settle this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. If you choose to deny it, there's only one way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. If you choose to deny it, there's only one way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. If you choose to deny it, there's only one way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A pirate duel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A pirate duel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A pirate duel!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Are you even listening
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Are you even listening
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Are you even listening
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaargh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaargh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaargh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Giddyup! Go, Captain Barbarossa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Giddyup! Go, Captain Barbarossa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Giddyup! Go, Captain Barbarossa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. A temporary alliance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. A temporary alliance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. A temporary alliance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll lend you the power of the great pirate! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll lend you the power of the great pirate! Yarr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll lend you the power of the great pirate! Yarr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't understand anything that's going on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't understand anything that's going on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't understand anything that's going on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yuuuppieee!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yuuuppieee!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yuuuppieee!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch... Good to see you, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch... Good to see you, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch... Good to see you, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How have you been?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How have you been?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How have you been?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. I'm glad you're okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. I'm glad you're okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. I'm glad you're okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I wanted to come get you earlier, but it took a while to convince Barbarossa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I wanted to come get you earlier, but it took a while to convince Barbarossa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I wanted to come get you earlier, but it took a while to convince Barbarossa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all good. You're here for me now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all good. You're here for me now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all good. You're here for me now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah! And I found out where the treasure was while you were away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah! And I found out where the treasure was while you were away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah! And I found out where the treasure was while you were away!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
While Credere went to save you
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
While Credere went to save you
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
While Credere went to save you
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Where's Credere?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Where's Credere?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Where's Credere?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know. We said we'd meet at the port.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know. We said we'd meet at the port.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know. We said we'd meet at the port.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-stop right there...
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-stop right there...
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-stop right there...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, please stop...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, please stop...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, please stop...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad to see you, but why do you have company?! Did you get into trouble again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad to see you, but why do you have company?! Did you get into trouble again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad to see you, but why do you have company?! Did you get into trouble again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere feels falsely accused. Credere is not a problem child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere feels falsely accused. Credere is not a problem child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere feels falsely accused. Credere is not a problem child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why did you jump here on one foot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why did you jump here on one foot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why did you jump here on one foot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: One foot is enough for those chumps.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One foot is enough for those chumps.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One foot is enough for those chumps.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aha. It's the same as wasting resources when you use two input devices!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aha. It's the same as wasting resources when you use two input devices!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aha. It's the same as wasting resources when you use two input devices!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't try to interpret that with weird metaphors! And there's nothing but water behind us, so we have nowhere to run!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't try to interpret that with weird metaphors! And there's nothing but water behind us, so we have nowhere to run!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't try to interpret that with weird metaphors! And there's nothing but water behind us, so we have nowhere to run!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yarr...! Don't forget about me, lubbers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yarr...! Don't forget about me, lubbers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yarr...! Don't forget about me, lubbers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A pirate ventures forth on water, not land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A pirate ventures forth on water, not land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A pirate ventures forth on water, not land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. I thought you were afraid of water, Barbarossa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. I thought you were afraid of water, Barbarossa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. I thought you were afraid of water, Barbarossa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that's what it said in the backstory book that the kids were reading.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that's what it said in the backstory book that the kids were reading.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that's what it said in the backstory book that the kids were reading.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Such narrow-minded thinking will not guide you to treasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Such narrow-minded thinking will not guide you to treasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Such narrow-minded thinking will not guide you to treasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll lend you my back, lubbers! We'll sail to the treasure in an instant!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll lend you my back, lubbers! We'll sail to the treasure in an instant!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll lend you my back, lubbers! We'll sail to the treasure in an instant!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What is it, lubber
8g Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What is it, lubber
8g Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What is it, lubber
8g Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! My body is losing its shape!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! My body is losing its shape!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! My body is losing its shape!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Barbarossaaaa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Barbarossaaaa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Barbarossaaaa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you insane, Credere? You can't just open the air valve!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you insane, Credere? You can't just open the air valve!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you insane, Credere? You can't just open the air valve!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was not Credere's doing. The strong wind made a hole in Mr. Duck's body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was not Credere's doing. The strong wind made a hole in Mr. Duck's body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was not Credere's doing. The strong wind made a hole in Mr. Duck's body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What? The wind wasn't coming from Barbarossa's body?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What? The wind wasn't coming from Barbarossa's body?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What? The wind wasn't coming from Barbarossa's body?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Then, was it the people who were chasing you
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Then, was it the people who were chasing you
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Then, was it the people who were chasing you
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're gone. Did they get swept up in the wind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're gone. Did they get swept up in the wind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're gone. Did they get swept up in the wind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those two returned in a hurry, saying that something came up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those two returned in a hurry, saying that something came up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those two returned in a hurry, saying that something came up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am glad that no conflict was born, as the Vice President's order was to capture, not eliminate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am glad that no conflict was born, as the Vice President's order was to capture, not eliminate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am glad that no conflict was born, as the Vice President's order was to capture, not eliminate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandpa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandpa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa? Did you call him, Chief? Like you did Barbarossa?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grandpa? Did you call him, Chief? Like you did Barbarossa?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, but "capture"...? What's that about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa? What are you doing?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Grandpa? What are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Sigma.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Sigma.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Sigma.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot stand by and watch you go down the wrong path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot stand by and watch you go down the wrong path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot stand by and watch you go down the wrong path.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Chief and... Wait, is that the duck from the Town Soldiers of Bremen?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, what's going on?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, what's going on?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, what's going on?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Enough with the underestimating...! First a girl, and now a duck?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Enough with the underestimating...! First a girl, and now a duck?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Enough with the underestimating...! First a girl, and now a duck?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You think we're some kind of extras!?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You think we're some kind of extras!?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You think we're some kind of extras!?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The three essential elements a pirate should have! The first is the yearning for treasure! The second is the quickness to overcome any situation!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The three essential elements a pirate should have! The first is the yearning for treasure! The second is the quickness to overcome any situation!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The three essential elements a pirate should have! The first is the yearning for treasure! The second is the quickness to overcome any situation!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The third is the courage to sail out to sea!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The third is the courage to sail out to sea!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The third is the courage to sail out to sea!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once you forget them, you're nothing but lubbers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once you forget them, you're nothing but lubbers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once you forget them, you're nothing but lubbers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lubbers can't beat true pirates! Yarr!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lubbers can't beat true pirates! Yarr!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lubbers can't beat true pirates! Yarr!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you calling pirates?! We're mercenaries!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you calling pirates?! We're mercenaries!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you calling pirates?! We're mercenaries!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmpf, if you choose to deny it, there's only one way to settle this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmpf, if you choose to deny it, there's only one way to settle this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmpf, if you choose to deny it, there's only one way to settle this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. If you choose to deny it, there's only one way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. If you choose to deny it, there's only one way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. If you choose to deny it, there's only one way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A pirate duel!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A pirate duel!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A pirate duel!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Are you even listening
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Are you even listening
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Are you even listening
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaargh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaargh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaargh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Giddyup! Go, Captain Barbarossa!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Giddyup! Go, Captain Barbarossa!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Giddyup! Go, Captain Barbarossa!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. A temporary alliance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. A temporary alliance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. A temporary alliance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll lend you the power of the great pirate! Yarr!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll lend you the power of the great pirate! Yarr!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll lend you the power of the great pirate! Yarr!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't understand anything that's going on...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't understand anything that's going on...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't understand anything that's going on...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yuuuppieee!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yuuuppieee!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yuuuppieee!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch... Good to see you, Chief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch... Good to see you, Chief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch... Good to see you, Chief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How have you been?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How have you been?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How have you been?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good. I'm glad you're okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good. I'm glad you're okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good. I'm glad you're okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I wanted to come get you earlier, but it took a while to convince Barbarossa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I wanted to come get you earlier, but it took a while to convince Barbarossa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I wanted to come get you earlier, but it took a while to convince Barbarossa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all good. You're here for me now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all good. You're here for me now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all good. You're here for me now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah! And I found out where the treasure was while you were away!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah! And I found out where the treasure was while you were away!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah! And I found out where the treasure was while you were away!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
While Credere went to save you
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
While Credere went to save you
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
While Credere went to save you
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Where's Credere?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Where's Credere?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Where's Credere?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know. We said we'd meet at the port.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know. We said we'd meet at the port.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know. We said we'd meet at the port.

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-stop right there...
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-stop right there...
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-stop right there...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, please stop...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, please stop...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, please stop...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yap.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yap.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yap.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Credere!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Credere!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Credere!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad to see you, but why do you have company?! Did you get into trouble again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad to see you, but why do you have company?! Did you get into trouble again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad to see you, but why do you have company?! Did you get into trouble again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Credere feels falsely accused. Credere is not a problem child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Credere feels falsely accused. Credere is not a problem child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Credere feels falsely accused. Credere is not a problem child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And why did you jump here on one foot?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And why did you jump here on one foot?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And why did you jump here on one foot?

root.m_Talk_ENG: One foot is enough for those chumps.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One foot is enough for those chumps.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One foot is enough for those chumps.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aha. It's the same as wasting resources when you use two input devices!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aha. It's the same as wasting resources when you use two input devices!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aha. It's the same as wasting resources when you use two input devices!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't try to interpret that with weird metaphors! And there's nothing but water behind us, so we have nowhere to run!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't try to interpret that with weird metaphors! And there's nothing but water behind us, so we have nowhere to run!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't try to interpret that with weird metaphors! And there's nothing but water behind us, so we have nowhere to run!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yarr...! Don't forget about me, lubbers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yarr...! Don't forget about me, lubbers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yarr...! Don't forget about me, lubbers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A pirate ventures forth on water, not land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A pirate ventures forth on water, not land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A pirate ventures forth on water, not land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. I thought you were afraid of water, Barbarossa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. I thought you were afraid of water, Barbarossa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. I thought you were afraid of water, Barbarossa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think that's what it said in the backstory book that the kids were reading.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think that's what it said in the backstory book that the kids were reading.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think that's what it said in the backstory book that the kids were reading.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Such narrow-minded thinking will not guide you to treasure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Such narrow-minded thinking will not guide you to treasure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Such narrow-minded thinking will not guide you to treasure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll lend you my back, lubbers! We'll sail to the treasure in an instant!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll lend you my back, lubbers! We'll sail to the treasure in an instant!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll lend you my back, lubbers! We'll sail to the treasure in an instant!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What is it, lubber
8g Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What is it, lubber
8g Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What is it, lubber
8g Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?! My body is losing its shape!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?! My body is losing its shape!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?! My body is losing its shape!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Captain Barbarossaaaa!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Captain Barbarossaaaa!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Captain Barbarossaaaa!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you insane, Credere? You can't just open the air valve!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you insane, Credere? You can't just open the air valve!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you insane, Credere? You can't just open the air valve!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was not Credere's doing. The strong wind made a hole in Mr. Duck's body.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was not Credere's doing. The strong wind made a hole in Mr. Duck's body.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was not Credere's doing. The strong wind made a hole in Mr. Duck's body.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What? The wind wasn't coming from Barbarossa's body?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What? The wind wasn't coming from Barbarossa's body?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What? The wind wasn't coming from Barbarossa's body?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Then, was it the people who were chasing you
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Then, was it the people who were chasing you
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Then, was it the people who were chasing you
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're gone. Did they get swept up in the wind?
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're gone. Did they get swept up in the wind?
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're gone. Did they get swept up in the wind?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those two returned in a hurry, saying that something came up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those two returned in a hurry, saying that something came up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those two returned in a hurry, saying that something came up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am glad that no conflict was born, as the Vice President's order was to capture, not eliminate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am glad that no conflict was born, as the Vice President's order was to capture, not eliminate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am glad that no conflict was born, as the Vice President's order was to capture, not eliminate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grandpa!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grandpa!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa? Did you call him, Chief? Like you did Barbarossa?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grandpa? Did you call him, Chief? Like you did Barbarossa?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grandpa? Did you call him, Chief? Like you did Barbarossa?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, but "capture"...? What's that about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, but "capture"...? What's that about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, but "capture"...? What's that about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grandpa? What are you doing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grandpa? What are you doing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grandpa? What are you doing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, Sigma.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, Sigma.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, Sigma.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot stand by and watch you go down the wrong path.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot stand by and watch you go down the wrong path.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot stand by and watch you go down the wrong path.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Prisoner G1-24601. Drop your weapons and surrender at once!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Prisoner G1-24601. Drop your weapons and surrender at once!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Prisoner G1-24601. Drop your weapons and surrender at once!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or else...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or else...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or else...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I swear on my brilliant Atlatl barrel, I cannot guarantee your well-being!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I swear on my brilliant Atlatl barrel, I cannot guarantee your well-being!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I swear on my brilliant Atlatl barrel, I cannot guarantee your well-being!
